task.title: Title
task.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this task?
task.deleteHasChildren: "{{title}}" has {{count}} child task(s). What would you like to do?
task.confirmPermanentDelete: This entry will be permanently deleted. Continue?
task.confirmEmptyRecycleBin: All entries in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted. Continue?

release.title: Releases
release.name: Name
release.hasTasksDependency: This release still has {{count}} assigned task(s). Remove the assignments first.
release.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this release?

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyHint: OpenAI API Key for AI text improvement
settings.boardColumnsHint: Choose which columns are collapsed by default on the board. Click to toggle.
settings.smtpHint: Configure SMTP to receive reminders via email.
settings.smtpTestBody: This is a test email from DragonFly.
settings.promptHint: Customize the system prompt sent to the AI. Leave empty or reset to use the default.
settings.deleteProjectHint: Permanently delete this project and all its data for all users. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteProjectHintLocal: Permanently delete this project and all its data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteProjectWarning: The following will be permanently deleted:
settings.deleteProjectIrreversible: This action is irreversible. All data associated with this project will be permanently deleted.
settings.leaveProjectHint: Remove this project from your local app. Other users are not affected.
settings.leaveProjectMessage: Are you sure you want to leave "{{name}}"? The project will be removed from your local app. You can rejoin later via the Join button.
settings.reminderSyncHint: Sync your personal reminders across devices. Select a PocketBase server from an existing project, then run Setup once.
settings.reminderSyncNoUrl: No sync URL configured for this project
settings.reminderSyncSecretHint: Share this secret with your other devices to sync reminders. Anyone with this secret can read your reminders.
settings.reminderSyncNewWarn: Generating a new secret disconnects all other devices. Reminders will no longer sync until the new secret is entered there.
settings.reminderSyncSmtpToggleHint: When enabled, email notification settings are synced. Disable to keep SMTP settings device-specific.
settings.autostartLabel: Start automatically when you log in
settings.autostartHint: The app starts minimized to the tray so reminders are always active.
settings.minimizeToTrayLabel: Hide to system tray instead of closing
settings.minimizeToTrayHint: When enabled, clicking X minimizes the app to the tray. Left-click the tray icon to restore it.

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.liveHint: Live transcription while speaking. Free, no API key needed. Uses Microsoft Speech Service (internet required). May not be available on Linux.
voice.openaiHint: Uses the existing OpenAI API key. ~$0.006 / minute. Very high accuracy, no local storage needed.
voice.localHint: Completely offline. No API key needed. Model is downloaded once and stored locally.

users.title: Users
users.name: Name
users.hasTasksDependency: This user still has {{count}} assigned task(s). Remove the assignments first.

notes.noSelection: Select a note or create a new one
notes.deleteHasChildren: "{{title}}" has sub-notes. What would you like to do?
notes.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this note?
notes.confirmPermanentDelete: This note will be permanently deleted. Continue?
notes.confirmEmptyRecycleBin: All notes in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted. Continue?

scratchpad.title: Scratchpads
scratchpad.noSelection: Select a scratchpad or create a new one
scratchpad.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this scratchpad?
scratchpad.confirmPermanentDelete: This scratchpad will be permanently deleted. Continue?
scratchpad.confirmEmptyRecycleBin: All scratchpads in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted. Continue?

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

passphrase.title: Unlock
passphrase.hint: Set a passphrase to protect your data. You will be asked for it each time the app starts.
passphrase.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters

project.title: Projects
project.name: Name
project.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this project? Tasks, notes and other data will no longer be accessible.
project.cannotDeleteLast: Cannot delete the last remaining project.
project.joinDescription: Connect to an existing server and join shared projects
project.noProjectsFound: No shared projects found on this DragonFly server
project.deletedByOtherMessage: This project was deleted by another user. You will be returned to the project selection.

sync.title: Synchronization
sync.setupHint: Automatically creates all required collections in PocketBase. Requires admin credentials (not stored).
sync.setupNeedsKey: Please fill in the Space Key above first.
sync.spaceKeyTooShort: Space Key must be at least 12 characters.
sync.spaceKeyStrengthWeak: Weak — use 12+ characters with uppercase, numbers, or symbols
sync.deleteAdminConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the admin credentials?
sync.shareProjectHint: Allow others to discover and join this project
sync.shareProjectHintFull: Show this project in the public project list on this server. Others with access to this server can then join it. Your data stays encrypted regardless.
sync.projectPassphraseHint: Share this code with others so they can find and join this project even when it is not publicly listed.
sync.projectPrivateCodeHint: Enter a code to find private projects not shown in the list.
sync.authFailed: Authentication failed. The Space Key does not match this server. Check your Space Key or use a different server.
sync.serverAlreadyConfigured: This server is already set up. Use Connect to join an existing project, or set up a different PocketBase instance.
sync.backupDescription: Before upgrading the schema, create a backup of your PocketBase data. This allows you to roll back if you need to return to an older app version.
sync.backupStep2: Click "Create backup" to generate a snapshot
sync.backupStep3: Download the .zip file to a safe location
sync.backupHint: Recommended file name: pb_backup_schema_v{{version}}.zip — this helps you identify which schema version the backup belongs to.
sync.setupNewHint: Setting up PocketBase for the first time? Create all required collections automatically.
sync.joinHint: Enter the PocketBase URL and Space Key provided by your admin.
sync.syncThisProject: Connect to an existing Dragonfly space
sync.syncThisProjectHint: Enter the Space URL shared by your admin. The PocketBase server must already be set up for DragonFly — use "New space" below if you're the first.
sync.connectConfirmDesc: This will upload and continuously sync "{{name}}" to the PocketBase space. All project data will be synchronized.
sync.connectAuthFailedHint: Authentication failed. Make sure the Space Key is correct and the PocketBase server has been set up for DragonFly.
sync.connectConfirmShareHint: Other users with the Space Key can find and join this project.

schema.appTooOldMessage: The database was created with a newer version (Schema v{{dbVersion}}). Your app supports Schema v{{appVersion}}. Please update the app.
schema.serverTooOldMessage: The server uses Schema v{{serverVersion}}, your app supports Schema v{{appVersion}}. The server schema needs to be updated.
schema.upgradeWarning: All users will need to update DragonFly afterwards.
schema.syncSchemaMismatchMessage: The server's PocketBase collections are on v{{serverVersion}}, this app requires v{{appVersion}}. Sync is blocked until the server is upgraded.
schema.syncSchemaContactAdmin: Contact your server admin to run the schema upgrade.

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.recordingLive: Click to stop and insert into note
voice.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please check permissions.
